stepAnswer: Phenomena exhibiting periodic, $$wave-like$$ behavior with consistent amplitude and period
stepTitle: Which of the following physical phenomena are best modeled by sinusoidal functions, characterized by a repeating, wave-like pattern with a consistent period and amplitude?
choices: Phenomena exhibiting periodic, $$wave-like$$ behavior with consistent amplitude and period
Phenomena with exponential growth or decay
Phenomena with linear relationships between variables
Phenomena that are random and unpredictable
